title: Indian-Style Turkey Skillet
description: A flavorful and spicy dish inspired by Indian cuisine, made with tender turkey and served in a skillet.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the oil and sauté the onion until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the ginger, garlic, cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the turkey breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the red pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the turkey is cooked through.
Let the turkey rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
